arts.ttl: Man United's £62m target Matheus Cunha hits out at Wolves fan channel over deleted post on Instagram which declared he would 'follow his dreams'
arts.sum: Cunha has been in red-hot form this season, scoring 15 goals in 29 games across all competitions, and he is all but certain to move on this summer.

arts.ttl: Pereira flourishes at Wolves until the boom-bust cycle repeats itself | Jonathan Wilson
arts.sum: Manager’s predecessor, Gary O’Neil, also enjoyed a fine start before things took a seemingly inevitable downturn Managers rise and managers fall and often there isn’t much reason for it. It was only a year ago that Gary O’Neil seemed one of the brightest young managers in the Premier League, but by December it was over. This is how football is: when a blip becomes a slump becomes a spiral, the only solution is the sacrifice of the manager. It often works: Wolves have improved dramatically under Vítor Pereira and, while they may not yet be mathematically safe from relegation, they surely soon will be. The life of man, the folk carol reminds us, is but a span; the life of a manager is even shorter (but a spanager?). O’Neil had replaced Scott Parker at Bournemouth four games into 2022-23, after their 9-0 defeat by Liverpool, and had kept them up comfortably, only to be jettisoned for Andoni Iraola. He took over Wolves less than a week before last season began and had them in the top half in March. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha clashes with Wolves fans after deleting eye-catching statement
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha deleted a post on Instagram - but not before it had been screenshotted and widely shared among unhappy Wolves fans, sparking an argument on social media

arts.ttl: Tottenham “believe they can tempt” 14-G/A Aston Villa target to join them
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Chelsea attacker Noni Madueke at the end of the season. The 23-year-old has done quite well for the Blues this season, and he has 14 goal contributions in all competitions. He is reportedly on the radar of Aston Villa as well. Marca cover the player today after he was the key man again this weekend, leading Las Palmas to a comeback that has revived Las Palmas’ chances of avoiding relegation. arts.ttl: The young coach making big waves at Tottenham and catching the eye of those in the game
arts.sum: When the final whistle blew on Friday night at the Lamex Stadium, Stuart Lewis pumped his fists in delight as Tottenham clinched the U17 Premier League Cup. Development is the key for any academy side and to see three youth products in Moore, Dane Scarlett and Ajayi all score on the same night in Spurs' Europa League victory against Elfsborg in January would have brought as much pride for Lewis as Friday night's latest trophy win did, for ultimately the aim of any youth set-up is to guide these gifted children all the way to success in the men's game.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Daniel Levy Stance on Tottenham Selling Udogie Emerges
arts.sum: Exclusive: Daniel Levy will only consider selling Tottenham star Destiny Udogie to Man City for a 'huge' offer.

arts.ttl: Tottenham man admits unknown injury ruined arrival at club – Yet to really bounce back
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur youngster Alejo Veliz has admitted his arrival at the club was somewhat difficult for him as he arrived with an unknown injury. The striker has been speaking to Ole about his time in Europe so far, which is yet to really get going for him. arts.ttl: Postecoglou hails Son Heung-min for putting team first despite lack of goals
arts.sum: The Tottenham captain has failed to score from open play in his last 15 club appearances.
